risk_title: Emergency Fund Reallocation Due to Tropical Storm Sara
risk_summary: The Ministry of Finance requested reallocation of US$25 million from COMRURAL II to address emergency response to Tropical Storm Sara through the Rapid Response Option, reducing project resources and implementation capacity during a climate-related crisis.
evidence_quote: On November 15, 2024, the Ministry of Finance requested the reallocation of US$25 million from COMRURAL II to address the emergency response to Tropical Storm Sara through the Rapid Response Option (RRO).

risk_title: Project Component Elimination Due to Emergency Response
risk_summary: Some Component 1 activities have been eliminated due to the Sara Storm fund reassignment, reducing the scope of agribusiness support and affecting beneficiary targets and private capital mobilization goals.
evidence_quote: 75 BPs under implementation. No additional BPs will be added due to Sara Storm fund reassignment and elimination of some Component 1 activites. Target will be reduced after restructuring by June 2025.

risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: The project maintains a Substantial risk rating for Political and Governance factors, indicating ongoing governance fragility that continues to constrain project implementation progress.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Rating] Substantial [at Approval] Substantial [Last Approved Rating] Substantial [Proposed Rating]
